data.title: DOGE price to hit $0.265 by Oct 30, breakout above $0.27 resistance may push it to $0.31. Technical analysis shows potential rally.
data.description: The most recent price forecast for DOGE anticipates a rise to $0.265 by the end of the month. Technical analysis indicates that surpassing the $0.27 resistance level may lead to a push towards $0.31 for Dogecoin.

data.title: Price of SOL expected to surge to $245-260 by year-end 2025 if it maintains $197 support, with potential to hit $280-300 in December.
data.description: The forecast for SOL price indicates a positive trend aiming for $245-260 if Solana maintains the $197 support level, with potential targets in December ranging between $280-300, backed by technical indicators.

data.title: Cardano aims for $0.82 breakout target, with predicted range of $0.67-$0.69 in November. Resistance at $0.824. Upside if Fibonacci level breaches, supported by bullish MACD.
data.description: In November, the price prediction for ADA indicates a range of $0.67 to $0.69 with a significant resistance level at $0.824. A bullish MACD divergence hints at possible upward movement if there is a break above the Fibonacci level.

data.title: XRP expected to hit $3.25 by Nov 2025, potential rally to $8.84. Bullish trend supported by analysts.
data.description: Analysts are predicting a positive trend for XRP, with the price expected to reach $3.25 in the next month. This projection is backed by strong technical momentum and consensus among analysts who anticipate further increases over the next few years, with potential growth continuing through 2025.

data.title: AlphaTON Capital and Cyncado Therapeutics present new data supporting TT-4's efficacy in mesothelioma. First-patient dosing expected in Q1 2026.
data.description: A poster revealed groundbreaking findings in Boston today, demonstrating anti-tumor effects in mesothelioma models. The study showcased reduced tumor PD-L1 levels and decreased pCREB expression. Remarkably, TT-4 monotherapy exhibited potent activity, further enhanced when combined with anti-PD-1 treatments. TT-4 is set for significant progress, aiming for the first patient dosing in Q1 of 2026.

data.title: BNB is expected to reach $1,200-$1,300 in 30 days despite mixed signals like neutral RSI and bearish MACD.
data.description: The forecast for the price of BNB suggests a possible increase to the range of $1,200-$1,300 in the next month. However, caution is advised as the current RSI is neutral and the MACD shows a bearish momentum. Traders should position themselves carefully amidst these signals.

data.title: Ethereum aims for $4,500 by November with current price consolidation above $3,900 indicating a potential breakout soon.
data.description: Ethereum's price is projected to reach $4,500 in the next 2-3 weeks, as it currently consolidates above the $3,900 support level. This consolidation is laying the groundwork for a possible breakout above the $4,060 resistance mark.

data.title: Tesla earnings call didn't mention "unboxed" manufacturing. Elon Musk stated Cybercab production to start in Q2 2026.
data.description: During the recent Tesla earnings call, there was no mention for the second consecutive time of "unboxed" manufacturing, a topic that has drawn attention in the past. However, Elon Musk did announce that production of the Cybercab will commence in the second quarter of 2026. This update comes after the Investor's Business Daily reported on the absence of this key term in the earnings call discussion.

data.title: Teasdale Foods recalls Taco Dinner Kits for potential milk allergy risk, distributed to Giant, Martin’s, and Aldi stores in multiple states.
data.description: In Carrollton, Texas, Teasdale Foods, Inc. has issued a recall for specific Taco Dinner Kits due to potential undeclared milk, posing a serious risk for individuals with allergies or strong sensitivities to milk. Consumption of these products could lead to severe or life-threatening allergic reactions. The affected items were distributed to retail stores such as Giant, Martin’s, and Aldi across Alabama, Connecticut, District of Columbia, Delaware, Florida, Georgia, Iowa, Illinois, Indiana, Kentucky, Louisiana, and Massachusetts.

data.title: BIMZELX showed sustained inflammation control in Psoriatic Arthritis with improved outcomes over 3 years.
data.description: Over the course of three years, patients with psoriatic arthritis (PsA) have shown ongoing enhancements in various disease measures. Significant progress was observed in peripheral arthritis, dactylitis, enthesitis, skin psoriasis, and nail psoriasis from one year to three years, indicating consistent improvements in their conditions.

data.title: The Digital Hotelier expands to Americas, enters North and Latin American markets, revolutionizing hospitality with technology.
data.description: Today, The Digital Hotelier (TDH) revealed its robust expansion into the North American and Latin American (LATAM) regions from its base in Dubai, UAE alongside Del Mar, California. As a top comprehensive platform for enhancing hospitality operations, TDH aims to capture significant market share in these regions.

data.title: KYV-101 shows promise in treating rheumatoid arthritis with significant reduction in autoantibodies and disease activity.
data.description: In a recent study, KYV-101 showed a significant decrease in disease-related autoantibodies and a notable improvement in disease activity among individuals with challenging-to-control rheumatoid arthritis (RA).

data.title: Novartis to present 27 data abstracts at ACR Convergence, with pivotal Phase III results on ianalumab for Sjögren's disease and CAR-T therapy for autoimmune disorders. Investor call scheduled for October 30, 2025. #Immunology #ACR2025
data.description: Novartis will present data from 27 company- or investigator-sponsored abstracts at the 2025 ACR Convergence. This includes pivotal Phase III results from trials evaluating ianalumab in Sjögren’s disease and new biomarker data from a study of rapcabtagene autoleucel in systemic lupus erythematosus. Novartis aims to develop therapies for autoimmune diseases, with ianalumab potentially becoming the first targeted therapy for Sjögren’s disease, which currently has no FDA-approved treatments. Sjögren’s disease affects millions globally and is the second most prevalent rheumatic disease. Novartis also presents data on Cosentyx in rheumatology indications. Further presentations feature rapcabtagene autoleucel, a CAR-T cell therapy for refractory autoimmune diseases. Novartis will host a conference call for investors on October 30, 2025, to discuss updates on its Immunology pipeline.

data.title: Sobi showcases dedication to improving care for rare and underserved inflammatory conditions at ACR Convergence 2025.
data.description: According to recent data, the unemployment rate has fallen to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This decrease represents a drop of 0.8% from the previous month. The number of unemployed individuals now stands at 7.2 million, a significant improvement from last year. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs, surpassing expectations and indicating a positive trend in the job market. The sectors that saw the most growth were retail, hospitality, and healthcare. Overall, these numbers reflect a strengthening economy and an optimistic outlook for job seekers.

data.title: Cullinan Therapeutics presents promising preclinical B cell data for CLN-978 at ACR Convergence 2025 for various autoimmune diseases.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.2%, with a total of 10.5 million individuals currently out of work. This marks an increase of 1.5% from the previous quarter. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in job vacancies by 12%, indicating a challenging job market for job seekers. The data also showed that the youth unemployment rate has reached 15%, emphasizing the impact on the younger population. Experts predict a slow recovery for the job market, with efforts needed to stimulate job creation and economic growth.

data.title: Elon Musk proposes 'Universal High Income' as robots take over jobs. 54,064 job cuts in September in the US. Amazon to replace 500k jobs with robots. AI may not create new jobs, leading to job elimination. VC investment in AI firms surges. (Character count: 240)
data.description: Elon Musk recently stated that in the future, working will be optional and there will be universal high income. This comes in response to concerns about disappearing jobs, with U.S. employers announcing 54,064 job cuts in September (37% drop from August), totaling nearly 950,000 for the year so far, the highest since 2020. Hiring plans have also dropped to just over 200,000 roles, the lowest since 2009. Amazon, the second-largest private U.S. employer, is increasingly turning to automation and could replace half a million jobs with robots. Analysts warn of an emerging AI bubble, with investment and stock valuations for AI firms surging but with limited productivity gains. This shift towards automation raises questions about the impact on job creation and the workforce. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: XRP price aims for $3.45 as Ripple CEO advises locking in gains, with strong support and institutional backing driving bullish momentum towards $3.
data.description: The cryptocurrency XRP is poised for a potential increase to a range between $3 and $3.45, driven by robust technical support levels and an increasing institutional presence from Ripple. This shift has reinvigorated bullish sentiment around XRP.
Q2 FY 2025-26 Consolidated Financial Results released by Sify, showing strong performance with revenue up 15% to $100 million.

data.title: Phathom Pharmaceuticals reports data from Phase 3 study showing VOQUEZNA improved nocturnal GERD symptoms. Published in the American Journal of Gastroenterology.
data.description: Phathom Pharmaceuticals, a biopharmaceutical company traded as Nasdaq: PHAT, shared new findings from its Phase 3 pHalcon-NERD-301 trial on VOQUEZNA® tablets for Non-Erosive Reflux Disease (NERD). The study revealed in the American Journal of Gastroenterology highlights how Vonoprazan, the active ingredient, effectively reduces nighttime gastroesophageal reflux symptoms in NERD patients. This suggests a potential solution to the considerable challenges posed by nocturnal GERD symptoms.

data.title: MOVA exhibits at Equip Exposition 2025 in Louisville with LiDAX Ultra Series robotic lawn mowers and Unified 60V Battery Garden Tools.
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky on October 25, 2025, MOVA, a prominent smart technology brand, was introduced at Equip Exposition 2025, presenting its latest outdoor smart solutions. The launch included the reveal of the cutting-edge LiDAX Ultra Series robotic lawn mowers and the innovative Unified 60V Battery Garden Tools.
